data.title: PM Kisan 17th Installment Released
data.description: The government has successfully disbursed the latest installment. Farmers can check their credit status on the PM-Kisan portal.

data.title: New Drone Subsidy for Rural Youth
data.description: Under the 'Drone Didi' scheme, the government is providing 80% subsidy for agricultural drones.

data.title: MSP for Wheat Increased for 2026
data.description: The cabinet has approved a significant increase in the Minimum Support Price for wheat.
